name: Good Morning
resistance_profile: Barbell hip hinge loading the hamstrings in the stretch; technique-demanding.
cues: Bar on the back, soft knees
Hinge back to a strong hamstring stretch
execution_steps: Set a barbell across your upper back as for a squat, feet hip- to shoulder-width, knees soft.
Brace your core hard and push your hips back, hinging your torso toward parallel with the floor.
Lower until you feel a strong hamstring stretch while holding a neutral spine.
Drive your hips forward to return to standing.
good_when: You want a heavy hamstring and glute hinge that also trains spinal-erector bracing.
You already have solid hinge technique and want a squat-pattern accessory.
bad_when: You are a beginner or have any lower-back issue (high technical and spinal demand).
You want to isolate the hamstrings with minimal spinal loading (use a leg curl).
